subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort in Rajasthan was built by Maharaja Man Singh of Amer?
question_hi: महाराजा मन सिंह अमेर ने किस महत्ता बनाई?
explanation_en: Maharaja Mansingh of Amer built Amer Fort. However, it was Maharaja Jai Singh II of Jaipur who built Mehrangarh Fort.
